economic_hypothesis: After the official 08:30 Eastern Employment Situation release, information absorption from the 09:30 open through the 16:00 close produces a positive SPY intraday premium after a conservative round-trip cost and relative to other sessions in the same calendar month.

methodology_source.citation: Pavel Savor and Mungo Wilson, How Much Do Investors Care About Macroeconomic Risk? Evidence from Scheduled Economic Announcements, Journal of Financial and Quantitative Analysis 48(2), 2013, 343-375.
methodology_source.mechanism_role: The published economic prior is that equity returns are higher on scheduled inflation, unemployment, and interest-rate announcement days; this definition separately tests only the post-release same-session Employment Situation interval.

lineage.distinct_from_usdem_004: This is one Employment Situation family and only the post-release same-session open-to-close interval; USDEM-004 was a closed input-blocked six-family prior-close announcement union with no numerical outcome.

event_identity.extraction_rule: For each calendar month from 2016-01 through 2024-12, select the first official BLS Employment Situation archive release and its 08:30 Eastern embargo timestamp. ALFRED release 50 is corroboration only because its list can include dates when any component series was revised.

excluded_noninitial_alfred_dates.2020-05-11: Correction after the 2020-05-08 April Employment Situation release.
excluded_noninitial_alfred_dates.2024-01-10: CPS seasonally adjusted data errata after the 2024-01-05 release.
excluded_noninitial_alfred_dates.2024-08-21: CES preliminary annual benchmark revision after the 2024-08-02 release.

data_contract.available_at_rationale: The bar is used only as the realized same-session execution and exit outcome after the 08:30 event, never as a signal input. The result remains retrospective and not strict PIT.

comparison.primary_observation: event gross open-to-close return minus 10 bps round-trip cost minus the mean gross open-to-close return of all non-Employment-Situation SPY sessions in the same calendar month

decision_rule.pass: Both validation and retrospective-holdout circular-block bootstrap one-sided lower bounds for mean net premium are strictly positive.
decision_rule.fail: Either split lower bound is zero or negative, or any frozen input/data gate fails.
decision_rule.no_repair: No parameter, event, cost, comparator, split, or threshold may change after outcome access.

limitations: Sina is a secondary retrospective source and available_at is unknown.
The screen uses raw same-session open and close only; it makes no overnight or total-return claim.
The 2021-04-02 and 2023-04-07 Good Friday releases are excluded rather than mapped to a later session.
A historical pass would require external review and still would not create a strategy candidate.
